summary: Tested 13 assertions: all 13 passed. Lock panel (VAL-LOCK-001 through VAL-LOCK-009) fully functional with correct parameters, comparison summary, verdict display, record creation with provenance, export, and notes field. Multi-config overlay (VAL-CHART-002) shows distinct teal/amber colors. Cross-area config propagation (VAL-CROSS-P3-002) verified across all 4 tabs. End-to-end lock flow (VAL-CROSS-P3-006) creates records with full provenance. Zero console errors during comprehensive interaction session (VAL-CROSS-P3-008). Note: VAL-LOCK-008 disabled state for UNSTABLE verdict cannot be fully tested with current fixture data (verdict is CONDITIONALLY_STABLE).
